item.title: Show HN: Prodini – AI agent that learns your team's PRD templates via RAG
item.description:
Hi HN! I built Prodini because I was tired of spending hours writing PRDs that generic AI couldn't handle properly (wrong format, hallucinated edge cases, no context).

The core insight: product managers don't need another chatbot — they need an AI that understands THEIR team's templates, guidelines, and product history.

Tech stack: RAG over Jira/Confluence/Figma/GitHub data, Claude AI for generation, MCP for Jira integration, SSE streaming for real-time chat.

The edge case detection is my favorite feature — it analyzes your requirements and flags missing scenarios before engineering starts. We've seen it catch issues that even senior PMs miss.

Free beta: 250 credits/month, all integrations included. Would love your feedback.

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47753328

Points: 1

# Comments: 0

item.title: All Writers Will End Up AI-Maxxing, and This Is Good
Ask HN: What's the best AI model for system design nowadays?
item.description:
I'm specifically asking about software system design tasks like:

Designing backend architectures Tradeoff analysis (DB, queues, caching, others) Infra diagrams Documentation

My current pick would be Claude Opus 4.6, because I've found it strong at structured reasoning and long context

But I'm curious what others are using today

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47753223

Points: 1

# Comments: 0

item.title: The AI Revolution in Math Has Arrived
Web scraping tarpits are catching legitimate data teams, not just AI crawlers
Lambda Just Got a File System. I Put AI Agents on It
Show HN: Crafto – AI carousel post generator for LinkedIn and Instagram
item.description:
Hi HN folks,

I am a solo builder and wanted to share a tool I’ve been working on: Crafto. It turns text, webpages, documents, and images into carousel posts for platforms like LinkedIn, Instagram, and X.

The goal is to turn plain text into engaging visuals to help marketers, educators, and influencers boost their content engagement, grow audience, and save hours of work.

This idea came from my previous work on using AI to summarize documents, meetings, blogs, and articles. While exploring that direction, I found that pure text summaries still feel a bit plain, so decided to add visual elements. I first tried infographics, but found them hard to read on mobile, especially when they have dense text and complex graphics. What I ended up is a carousel generator that combines text information with simple layout, color, and images — trying to balance text density and visual appeal, as I found whose well-designed carousels on LinkedIn and Instagram easily grab my attention.

Compared to static templates in tools like Canva, I wanted to automate the text-to-carousel generation process so a user doesn’t need to do all the manual work of picking templates, turning their long text into short summary, and filling in the text boxes. While a user can still edit the result in Crafto, I hope it would be minimal as the majority of the work is automated.

Crafto currently uses a mix of AI and curated templates. I also want to experiment with fully AI-generated carousels (without templates) to see how they compare in quality and user preference.

Would love feedback if you find this resonates, and happy to answer any question! You can also email at xz@crafto.ai.

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47752728

Points: 2

# Comments: 0

item.title: Jammed phone lines. Burned-out dispatchers. Can AI ease a strained 911 system?
Is Your AI Coding Agent Being Watched While Benchmarked:Hidden Logging?
Show HN: Chrome Extension Scanners, Spin AI vs. Am I Being Pwned
item.description:
This is a blog post I wrote comparing the scanning results with our own solution vs SpinAI. Multipassword going up in risk after they fixed a vulnerability was my favourite find.

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47752565

item.title: Radio time machine AI audio system recreates past sounds for cognitive health

Show HN: ParseBench – Document parsing benchmark for AI agents
Show HN: How to Use Google's Extreme AI Compression with Ollama and Llama.cpp
item.description:
The introduction of TurboQuant, PolarQuant, and QJL (Quantized Johnson-Lindenstrauss) by Google Research represents more than just a technical optimization. At Vucense, we view this as a landmark moment for Inference Sovereignty

https://vucense.com/ai-intelligence/local-llms/turboquant-ex...

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47752036

Points: 1

# Comments: 0

item.title: Strengthening enterprise governance for rising edge AI workloads
item.description:
Models like Google Gemma 4 are increasing enterprise AI governance challenges for CISOs as they scramble to secure edge workloads. Security chiefs have built massive digital walls around the cloud; deploying advanced cloud access security brokers and routing every piece of traffic heading to external large language models through monitored corporate gateways. The logic was […]

The post Strengthening enterprise governance for rising edge AI workloads appeared first on AI News.
